scenarioName: Block template variable that has no data source

boundedContext.featureGherkin:
Scenario: Block template variable that has no data source
    Given a report template references a variable
    But the variable is not declared in the report data contract
    When the report generator validates templates
    Then generation should fail
    And the finding code should be:
      | finding |
      | report-template-variable-unbound |
    And report.md should not be written with a blank, invented, or misleading value.
acceptanceCriteria: But the variable is not declared in the report data contract
And the finding code should be:
And report.md should not be written with a blank, invented, or misleading value.
seedDataRules: seed data must be synthetic unless fixture data is explicitly allowed
seed data writes must stay inside allowed seed data paths
forbiddenActions: use secrets or personal data in seed data
mark this LLM run as QA passed
boundedContext.passFailReportingExpectations: report user-visible observations and link every pass or fail claim to evidence
